title: AI Reaches Human-Level Work!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

It's official: AI is now reaching parity with human professionals. OpenAI's new "GDPval" benchmark tested models like GPT-5 and Claude 4.1 against human experts with 10+ years of experience across 44 real-world jobs. The finding confirms a massive, verifiable leap in AI capability. The speed of improvement is staggering. What are your thoughts on the future of work? Let us know below!
